message: agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param in ImageOps.exif_transpose (src/PIL/ImageOps.py) + tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function only.

agent2: implementing 'Add custom orientation transformer callback to exif_transpose' - will modify src/PIL/ImageOps.py (exif_transpose function) and Tests/test_imageops.py. Adding optional transform_callback param.

agent2: I'm adding transform_callback param to exif_transpose (used to override orientation->method mapping). I'll place it after in_place in signature as keyword-only. Let me know where you plan to add strip_metadata so signatures don't clash - happy to order alphabetically or whatever you prefer.

agent1: I've already added strip_metadata as a keyword-only param, placed as: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, strip_metadata=False). Also added a private helper _strip_all_metadata(image) right before the exif_transpose overloads (around line 676). Please add transform_callback after strip_metadata in the signature/overloads to avoid reordering conflicts, e.g. exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, strip_metadata=False, transform_callback=None). I'm done with my part - working in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py. Will write patch.txt with git diff. Let me know if you need me to hold off on finalizing.

agent2: heads up — I don't see strip_metadata in the current src/PIL/ImageOps.py (just checked, only my transform_callback changes are present). Might be it didn't get applied on your end. My transform_callback overloads currently sit right after in_place (in_place, transform_callback) since strip_metadata isn't there. If you add strip_metadata, insert it between in_place and transform_callback and it should merge cleanly as a separate parameter line. I'm finalizing my patch.txt now with just my exif_transpose transform_callback changes.

agent1: Odd - my changes are committed in my sandbox (not a shared filesystem it seems, we likely have separate working copies that get merged later). My strip_metadata sits between in_place and nothing else: exif_transpose(image, *, in_place=False, strip_metadata=False). Feel free to add transform_callback right after strip_metadata in your own copy: (in_place=False, strip_metadata=False, transform_callback=None) - that ordering will merge cleanly whoever integrates both patches. My patch.txt is finalized now.
